12th bhava : 6th lord in 12th bhava, if afflicted in 12th then there is fear of bad health with dangers.
If it is associated with benefic then it will not create problem but give benefits secretly.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
42

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Results of the 7th Lord in the 12 bhavas of paribhraman
1st bhava : 7th lord in the 1st bhava, if strong and well aspected then there is happiness, expansion
of business, desire to travel, opportunities to travel. etc.
If 7th lord is in good aspect with Ascendent, 5th house & 11th house in paribhraman chart & good
